text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 19. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
